products.name: One Piece Lamp Devil Fruit Baku Baku (WAPOL) 14cm
products.description:
One Piece Lamp. Official product by Bandai.

Add a touch of magic to your home with the ONE PIECE - DEVIL FRUITS ROOM LIGHT - BAKU BAKU FRUIT (WAPOL) lamp by BANDAI. Inspired by the famous demon fruit from the One Piece universe, this lamp faithfully represents the Baku Baku no Mi with its swirling patterns and bright purple color. Perfect for fans of the series, it diffuses a soft, soothing light, ideal for creating a relaxing atmosphere in any room. Made from high-quality materials, this lamp is both a unique decorative object and a tribute to the work of Eiichiro Oda. Transform your space with this must-have piece for any One Piece collector.

products.name: One Piece Replica "Pyro-Fruit" 13cm
products.description:
One Piece Replica of Pyro-Fruit, size approx.13cm. Official product by Abystyle.

Add some fire to your One Piece collection with ABYstyle Studio's replica of the Flame-Flame Fruit (Mera Mera no Mi)!

Once consumed by Portgas D. Ace and later by Sabo, this iconic fruit grants its user the power to create, control, and transform into fire. Expertly crafted from high-quality resin, this replica captures every detail with precision, from the flame-like pattern to the fiery orange hue. Whether you're a die-hard collector or a casual One Piece fan, this life-size model is more than just a piece of memorabilia: it's a fiery slice of the One Piece universe that will light up your collection with authenticity and excitement!

  • Resin replica
  • Height: 13cm
  • Scale: 1:1 (Life-size)

products.name: One Piece Replica "Gum-Gum Fruit" 13cm
products.description:
One Piece Replica of Gum-Gum Fruit, size approx.13cm. Official product by Abystyle.

Complete your One Piece collection with treasure from the Grand Line: bring home a replica of the Gum-Gum Fruit (Gomu Gomu no Mi) by ABYstyle Studio!

Famously devoured by Monkey D. Luffy, the iconic fruit transforms whoever consumes it into a rubber human with elastic abilities. Crafted from top-quality resin, this life-size replica perfectly captures the essence of the original, from the curling pattern to the deep purple hue. Whether you're a dedicated collector or a cosplay enthusiast, this replica isn't just a piece of memorabilia: it's a tangible slice of the adventurous world of One Piece right in the palm of your hand.

  • Resin replica
  • Height: 13cm
  • Scale: 1:1 (Life-size)

products.name: One Piece Set of 2 Glass Devils Fruits 300ml
products.description:
One Piece Set of 2 Glass, capacity approx.300ml, official product by Abystyle.

The Gomu Gomu no Mi or rubber fruit is a fruit full of surprises and bounces! Its user, Luffy, exploits it to the full to become one of the strongest people in One Piece. The same goes for his brothers, Ace and Sabo, who have exploited the full extent of the power of Mera Mera no Mi, the fruit of fire. Choose your favourite fruit with this superb set of 2 One Piece glasses by ABYstyle!

  • Material: high quality glass.
  • Capacity : 30cl.
  • Dishwasher safe: more than 700 cycles in the dishwasher.

products.name: Naruto Shippuden 56 Playing Scenes in Trump Style
products.description:
Naruto Shippuden 56 Playing Cards. Official product by Ensky.

Enter the captivating world of Naruto Shippuden with this exclusive playing card set. Published by Ensky, this set is a treasure trove for fans, featuring iconic scenes from the series in a style reminiscent of traditional playing cards. Each card is a window into the world of ninjas, offering exceptional image quality and vivid colors that bring beloved characters like Naruto, Sasuke and Sakura to life. Ideal for collectors or to liven up your game nights, this game is a must-have for any anime aficionado.

products.name: Naruto Shippuden 56 Playing Scenes Pack Lightning
products.description:
Naruto Shippuden 56 Playing Cards. Official product by Ensky.

Immerse yourself in the captivating world of Naruto Shippuden with this set of 56 playing cards published by Ensky. Each card is a window onto the series' iconic scenes, capturing the essence of the characters and key moments with exceptional image quality. Ideal for fans, this “Scenes Pack Lightning” offers not only classic entertainment but also a unique collection of Naruto art. Perfect for game nights with friends or as a collector's item.

products.description:
One Piece Lamp. Official product by Bandai.

This Ito Ito no Mi demon fruit lamp is as decorative as it is functional. Its characteristic white shape, dotted with spiral motifs, and bright red stem instantly recall the power of the famous pirate's thread.

Functionality: Ambiance lamp with soft, warm light.

This dynamic Luffy figurine, in Gear 5 form, is more than just a decoration: it's a real holder for your smartphone! With his trademark smile and acrobatic pose, Luffy seems to stretch to the heavens, ready for new adventures.

Functionality: As well as being a figurine, it's also a phone holder.

products.description:

Great men have worn this cap: The Ex-Admiral in Chief, Sengoku the Buddha but also the current head of the Marine's armies, the terrible Akainu are the best examples! Get in line and make justice reign by joining the sea force elite troops of the World government thanks to this superb replica cap of the Marines in One Piece by ABYstyle!

  • High quality embroidery
  • One size fits all
  • Surface washable only
  • 100% Nylon

products.name: One Piece Hat Tony Tony Chopper
products.description:
One Piece Hat of Tony Tony Chopper. Official product by Abystyle.

A headache? An infection? A war wound from a clash with the Navy? Don't worry, Doctor Tony Tony Chopper is here! Become the doctor of the Hat Crew thanks to this magnificent One Piece replica hat by ABYstyle!

Adult size fiting many head sizes thanks to an elastic band at the back.

Padding at the top of the cap for perfect volume

Dimensions: diameter 19cm, height 19cm

Blue, pink and white

100% polyester (soft touch material)

Hand surface wash only

products.name: Disney Teapot with Tinkerbell cups set 1200ml

  • Teapot capacity: 1200ml
  • Cup capacity: 200ml
  • Finish: Matte
  • Material: ceramic
  • Not suitable with microwave and dishwasher

products.name: Netflix Gift Box 24-day Advent Calendar Collector with TUDUM ! sound
products.description:
Get ready for your favorite Netflix shows and movies to pop off the screen and into your living room. With 24 exclusive collectible items from titles like Stranger Things, Bridgerton, One Piece, Squid Game, Outer Banks, Rebel Moon, and The Witcher, fans can choose to share their gifts with friends and family, or keep them for themselves!

Stranger Things

Explore the mysterious world of Hawkins, where the supernatural meets 1980s nostalgia. Plunge yourself in Stranger Things lore with one-of-a-kind mementos.

What's Inside

10 art postcards by independent artists

Rare Demogorgon bobblehead figure

Rare Eleven figurine

Pop-art Demogorgon acrylic stand

Bridgerton

Experience Regency romance and opulence with unique Bridgerton items fit for the season's diamond.

What's Inside

Gold-plated teaspoon with floral motif

Gold-embossed Lady Whistledown notebook

Acrylic bookmark with gold tassel

One Piece

products.name: One Piece Lamp Devil Fruit Op Op Fruit 16cm
products.description:
One Piece Lamp. Official product by Bandai.

A unique piece for One Piece fans

This lamp in the shape of the Op Op demon fruit, the fruit of Trafalgar Law, is a must-have for all fans of the universe created by Eiichiro Oda. It combines anime aesthetics with practical functionality.

A design faithful to the original

The lamp is a faithful replica of the Op Op demon fruit, with its characteristic colors and realistic texture. Careful attention is paid to details such as the fruit's shape and texture. The light emitted by the lamp creates a warm, subdued atmosphere, perfect for relaxing or reading.

Uses 2 AAA batteries (sold separately)

products.name: One Piece Lamp Devil Fruit Suna Suna No Mi (Crocodile) 18cm
products.description:
One Piece Lamp. Official product by Bandai.

This innovative One Piece figurine combines the aesthetics of the Demon Fruit with the functionality of a bedside lamp. Inspired by the sand fruit eaten by Crocodile, the Suna Suna no Mi, this piece is a must-have for fans of the One Piece universe.

Design faithful to the manga: The figurine faithfully reproduces the appearance of the Suna Suna no Mi, with its characteristic textures and colors. The fruit is carefully sculpted to reproduce its manga appearance as closely as possible.

Functionality: As well as being a collector's item, this figurine also serves as a lamp. A soft light emanates from the fruit, creating a pleasant, subdued ambience in your room.

Uses 2 AAA batteries (sold separately)

products.name: One Piece Vinyl Original Soundtrack Land of Wano 1x
products.description:
One Piece Vinyl Original Soundtrack. Official product by Microids Records.

One Piece's ultimate arc finally available on vinyl Determined to do battle with Kaido, Luffy is going to need his entire crew if he's to succeed. So much the better, as we finally meet up with Zoro, Robin, Franky and the rest of the crew. In this medieval Japanese atmosphere, the adventure promises to be thrilling! With these BGMs, Kohei Tanaka, star composer of the entire One Piece series, revisits traditional Japanese songs to adapt them to the grand world of piracy, while adding more orchestral music. This allows fans to feel the epic yet terrifying side of this arc, which features one of the greatest battles in the entire One Piece saga. Kohei Tanaka has also made a name for himself in other works such as Assassination Classroom and the Sakura Wars video game series.

products.name: One Piece Vinyl Soundtrack Whole cake Island 1x
products.description:
One Piece Vinyl Original Soundtrack. Official product by Microids Records.

Whole Cake Island: Sweetness and Danger in an Unforgiving World! As Luffy and his crew face their first Emperor, Big Mom, they must join forces to save Sanji in the extravagant kingdom of Totto Land.

products.name: One Piece Stampede Vinyl Original Soundtrack 1x
products.description:
One Piece Vinyl Original Soundtrack. Official product by Microids Records.

Kohei Tanaka worked on the composition and arrangement of this album.

One Piece is a Japanese manga written and illustrated by Eiichiro Oda. The story follows Monkey D. Luffy, a young boy whose body became elastic after eating a Devil Fruit. Luffy decides to become the Pirate King and find the One Piece, a legendary treasure hidden on Raftel Island.

products.name: One Piece New World Vinyl Original Soundtrack 2x
products.description:
One Piece Vinyl Original Soundtrack. Official product by Microids Records.

Tracklist : 

Face A (Sabaody/Fishman Island/Punk Hazard) :

– To the New World!!

 – Rebirth! The Straw Hat Pirates 

– Jinbei Strait 

– Surgeon of Death

– Master’s Scornful Laughter 

– Enemies Appear 

– Spirit Of Guru

-The Weak Power Strengthens! 

–  A Man’s Battle

Face B (Dressrosa)

– I Think Of The Past 

– Go Go! The Straw Hat Pirates!! 

– Country of Love, Passion & Toys, Dressrosa 

– Frenzy! Colosseum

– Donquixote Doflamingo 

– Trafalgar Law 

– Admiral "Fujitora" 

– Violet’s Dance of Passion 

– Love Cannot Be Stopped 

– Fight in the Colosseum 

– Fierce Battle in the Colosseum

Face C (Dressrosa/Zou)

– Revolutionary Army’s Chief of Staff, Sabo 

– Gear Fourth 

– Ballad of Sadness 

– Approaching! Birdcage Encirclement 

– Doflamingo ~Overwhelming Force~ 

– The Thousand Year Island, Zou 

– Garuchu~!! 

– The Mink Tribe’s Battle 

– The Samurai and Mink Tribe’s Bond 

– Dressrosa’s Hidden Secrets 

– Brook ~Healing Violin~ 

– Eyecatch ~New World Version~

Face D (3D2Y/Heart of Gold)

– To the Origin of Ace! – Main Title ~ Teachings of Rayleigh 

– Things We Desired 

– World VS Luffy: Final Battle 

– Destroyer of the World! World 

– Loneliness, Solitude 

– Gathering of the Straw Hat Pirates! Towards Battle 

– Releasing the Trap 

– Straw Hat Pirates VS Mad Treasure 

– Luffy, to Victory 

– Escape from Bonbori-sama 

– Next Time Preview ~We Go! Version~

products.name: One Piece Movies Vinyl Soundtrack Best Selection 2x
products.description:
One Piece Vinyl Original Soundtrack. Official product by Microids Records.

Immerse yourself in the musical universe of ONE PIECE MOVIES - BEST SELECTION !

Discover the music from the One Piece films for the first time on vinyl!

Over 70 minutes of music that will take you on a journey through the adventures of the famous crew of the straw hat! 

FACE A

The thieving brothers make their appearance 

Sanji's in trouble! 

Terror of the Cannon King 

Boroodo's confession 

Rage of the Bear King 

Zoro, the spirited swordsman 

Bet your life on it! 

Mother, then departure 

The butler and his sidekick appear! 

An enemy arrives!

Sanji vs Snake 

FACE B

A great fight! 

A fierce battle! Zoro & Sanji 

Shuraiya vs Needles 

Go ahead and fly! 

The power of Gasparde 

Shuraiya's past 

As long as you're alive 

Luffy appears! 

The sea swordsman's battle cry 

The action begins 

Three turns 

Luffy's ferocious attack

Resort island 

Sinking... 

Attention 

Thoughts don't go far enough 

FACE C

Karakuri defence system, activate! 

Karakuri defence system, deploy! 

Something terrible is awakening! 

It's waking up! 

A mother's love 

The golden crown exists! 

Ratchet's ambition 

Karakuri Castle, transform yourselves! 

Straw-hatted pirates, start your counter-attack! 

Giant fortress, take off! 

Karakuri on guard! 

Luffy versus Ratchet Round 1 

Zoro versus General Maji 

Sanji versus Captain Honki

Luffy versus Ratchet Round 2 

FACE D

I'll outdo you!!! 

Condemnation of the Blackbeard pirates

Be quiet! !! Let's go !!!!

Daft Green ~Cause of Tragedy~ (cause of tragedy)

Gathering ~Last desperate hope~

The operation begins ~The village is destroyed~

Terror of the giant animals ~Things were already bad!

Sanji's wind leg ~It's a taste of East Blue love~

The final battle ~Giant Thor's axe~

Song of triumph ~Islands fall into the sea, people fly to the sky~

products.name: One Piece Statue 1/6 Marco the Phoenix Ikigai by Tsume 37cm
products.description:
One Piece Statue of Marco the Phoenix in Ikigai collection, 1/6 scale size approx.37cm. Official product in limited edition of 2000 pieces by Tsume Art.

- PHOENIX -

Marco's power lies in the Tori Tori no Mi devil fruit, Phoenix model, which allows him to transform into this mythical animal. We have depicted him here in the pose he had in Marineford, facing Kizaru.

- FLAMES -

His power grants him not only the ability to fly but also exceptional powers of regeneration, symbolizing the resurrection and immortality associated with the phoenix. He can envelop his body in regenerative blue flames, making him nigh invincible. Its flames are represented here on the base, with a superb paint effect.

- LOYAL -

Marco embodies unwavering loyalty to his comrades and crew. As commander of the first division of Whitebeard's crew, he has demonstrated his unwavering dedication time and again. Even after Whitebeard's death, he continued to honor his captain's memory and watch over the former members of the crew.

Dimensions : 18 X 36 X 37 CM

products.description:
One Piece Mug, capacity of 320ml. Official product by Abystyle.

Before becoming helmsman of the Straw Hat Crew, Jinbe had some great adventures! "The Knight of the Sea" was captain of the Sun Pirates crew, a former Warlord and also a member of Big Mom's crew. Luffy's savior on several occasions, he stands out for his loyalty and integrity! Learn Fishman Karate with Jinbe thanks to this One Piece mug by ABYstyle!

  • Mug in high quality ceramic. Standard size (320ml)
  • Packaging: black window-box
  • Dishwasher and micro-wave safe

products.description:

Do you have the soul of a scientist and want to discover the innovations of the future? Or are you looking for Doctor Vegapunk? Join the Straw Hat Crew on Egg-Head island! Discover the mysteries of this island with Luffy, thanks to this One Piece mug by ABYstyle! But beware, Marine soldiers are never far away...

  • Based on the One Piece anime series
  • Highly detailed
  • Features LED dynamic lighting effect
  • Limited edition of 300 pieces

products.name: One Piece Card Game Sound Loader Volume.1
products.description:
One Piece Card Game Sound Loader Volume.1 in English. Official product by Bandai.

To commemorate the 2nd anniversary of "ONE PIECE Card Game", we will commercialize a card loader with audio gimmick exclusively for ONE PIECE Card Game.

The main body is an easy-to-carry size that fits in the official card case, and can store one ONE PIECE card. Not only can it be used to store cards, but it can also be used to compete in the ONE PIECE card game while the cards are in the sound loader.

By pressing the BGM button on the side of the main unit, you can play “We Are!” in Volume.1. (TV size with narration)'' and each includes sound effects inspired by over 30 characters. Two types of sound effects are included for each character.

By playing background music to increase the excitement while playing, and by playing character sound effects in time with actions such as when attacking, you can experience how to enjoy a card game that immerses you in the world view.

Also included is a ONE PIECE card with a special illustration that is limited to this product. Volume.1 comes with "OP05-060 Monkey D. Luffy", and Volume.2 comes with "OP05-098 Enel".

products.name: One Piece Keychain Skull Ace 5cm
products.description:
One Piece Keychain of Skull Ace, size approx.5cm. Official product by ABYSTYLE.

This wonderful One Piece keychain by ABYstyle represents the emblem of the brother of Luffy, Ace.

  • Keychain in high quality metal
  • Packaging with blister card easy to hang.
  • Dimensions: H. 5cm x L. 4cm

products.name: One Piece Manga Edition Originale Volume 105 *French*
products.description:
One Piece Manga in French. Official product by Glenat.

Version with a special first printing jacket.

products.name: One Piece Card Game PRB-01 Premium Booster Display (20 PACKS) *EN*
products.description:
One Piece Card Game PRB-01 Premium Booster Display (20 PACKS) in English. Official product by Bandai.

Reprints of Many Popular Cards from OP01 to OP06, and includes new parallel illustrations created for this pack!

Introducing special DON!! Cards designed exclusively for this Booster Pack!

*10 cards per pack

  • Leader x1
  • Common x23
  • Uncommon x25
  • Promotion Card x4
  • Rare x21
  • Super Rare x27
  • Secret Rare x8
  • DON!! Card x30
  • 109+30 card types
